instructions: Resolve every required input before side effects.
Stop when a required capability is denied, unsupported, or awaiting approval.
Stay within the project or an explicitly approved artifact root.
Preserve the named output contract and report skipped validation honestly.
Do not publish externally, mutate user scope, or rewrite Git history.

behaviorContract.purpose: Produce a complete Java and Spring backend design artifact for senior review without implementing code.

inputs.name: REQUEST
inputs.description: Problem, goals, and constraints to design for.

inputs.name: PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH
inputs.description: Repository-relative destination for the plan artifact.

decisionTable.when: All required inputs are resolved and the destination is within the approved artifact root.

invariants: Choose one design and explain rejected alternatives.
Keep chat output to the artifact path and three to five executive bullets.
stopConditions: PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH is unresolved or outside the approved artifact root.
Repository policy forbids the artifact write.

workflowSteps.action: Resolve the request and validate the output path.
Extract assumptions, constraints, and acceptance concerns.
Select one design and record rejection rationale for alternatives.
Write the complete twelve-section design document.

deviationPolicy.instructions: Stop and request direction before changing the requested scope, destination, or design-only boundary.

validation: Confirm the artifact exists at PLAN_OUTPUT_PATH.
Confirm all twelve required sections are present.

claimBoundary: Behavior-complete machine-readable contract generated from the canonical behavior IR; the Skill contains the same generated contract plus explanatory authored guidance.
